corrections.text: The article states that during the 35-hour autonomous run, the model 'made more than 1,000 tool calls while optimizing a compute kernel, ultimately achieving a roughly 10x improvement in inference speed compared with the manufacturer's reference implementation.' These specific quantitative details are attributed to South China Morning Post but were not found in the SCMP snapshot archived at review time. These figures likely originate from Alibaba's press release or summit demo materials and could not be independently verified from the cited source.
